name: Makaronia SE Forma Me Kima (Macaroni & Hamb.
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Tomatoes, peeled and strained OR 1 tablespoon Tomato paste diluted with:
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onion using 3 tablespoons of butter. Break up the meat with a wooden spoon during cooking.
2. Add tomatoes (or tomato paste diluted in water) and seasoning. Cook over low heat for about 20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed.
3. Cook macaroni according to package instructions and drain.
4. Brown the remaining butter in another pan and pour it over the macaroni.
5. Beat egg whites lightly and add them.
6. Prepare the béchamel sauce: melt butter, gradually add flour, blending well. Add hot milk and stir rapidly with a clean wooden spoon until thickened. Remove from heat and blend in egg yolks.
7. Pour the béchamel sauce over macaroni. Sprinkle with cheese.
8. Butter a round cake pan and spread 2 phyllo sheets into it (let sheets extend over the pan; do not trim).
9. Brush with melted butter. Spread half the macaroni on the phyllo, top with chopped meat, and add the rest of the macaroni. Fold edges of the phyllo up over it.
10. Use the remaining 2 phyllo sheets for the top: butter each and trim to fit the pan.
11. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for about 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Cool; turn out onto a platter.
